# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe the change and the problem it solves.

## Changes

- List the main code or behavior changes
- Keep this focused on reviewer-relevant details

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Relevant tests were run when available
- [ ] Manual verification was performed when needed

Validation notes:

- Add commands, screenshots, or short manual test steps here

## Data and Security Impact

- [ ] No schema change
- [ ] Schema/migration change included
- [ ] No auth or permission impact
- [ ] Auth, permission, or data exposure impact reviewed

Notes:

- Mention migrations, RLS, env vars, secrets, or privileged behavior if applicable

## Documentation

- [ ] No doc updates needed
- [ ] README updated
- [ ] AGENTS updated
- [ ] CONTRIBUTING updated
- [ ] Other docs updated

## Reviewer Notes

- Add any risks, tradeoffs, follow-ups, or areas where extra review is helpful
